---
title: "Demultiplexing and QC results of BAL scRNA-seq data"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Data Processing {.tabset}

### Demultiplexing
- [batch1](01.demux_BP1.html)
- [batch2](01.demux_BP2.html)
- [batch3](01.demux_Pi1.html)
- [batch4](01.demux_capture1.html)

### Quality control
- [batch1](02.qc_BP1.html)
- [batch2](02.qc_BP2.html)
- [batch3](02.qc_Pi1.html)
- [batch4](02.qc_capture1.html)
